prompt: What does this program print? (Builder pattern)
answer:
large/thick cheese=true pep=true
small/thin cheese=false pep=false
explanation: Builder pattern collects optional configuration through chained calls. p1 sets all options. p2 uses all defaults (crust='thin', cheese=false, pepperoni=false). Each build() call creates an independent immutable Pizza.
alternatives:
large/thick cheese=true pep=true
small/thin cheese=false pep=false
